privileged_info_summary: The task uses the Natural Earth ne_110m_admin_0_countries GeoJSON dataset (838 KB, 177 features, public domain). The POP_EST field contains real-world 2019 population estimates ranging from 140 to 1.4 billion people across all countries, making it suitable for 5-class graduated symbology visualization. The task correctly specifies the public GitHub URL, the real field name (POP_EST), and the minimum class count (5). Setup script contains an outdated file size comment (claims ~2.5MB but actual file is 0.80MB).
